name: Ricoh Pentax WG-90 Digital Camera
description: Built to operate in the harshest conditions, the blue Pentax WG-90 Digital Camera from Ricoh provides a reliable means of capturing still photos and video in situations where ordinary cameras fall short.

features.Key Features:: For Outdoor and Underwater Photography | 16MP BSI CMOS Sensor | 2.7" LCD Monitor with AR Coating | 5x Optical Zoom Lens | Built-In Ring Light | Full HD Movie Recording | 6 LED Macro Lights on Lens Barrel | Impact, Freeze, and Waterproof | Triple Anti-Shake Protection
features.What’s in the box?: Ricoh Pentax WG-90 Digital Camera (Blue) | Rechargeable Li-Ion Battery D-LI92 | Power Adapter AC-U2 | Power Plug | USB Cable I-USB157 | Strap O-ST104 | Macro Stand O-MS1 | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
